featureAreas.description: Drag-and-drop pipeline construction in the V2 editor — adding/connecting components, configuring inputs/outputs, YAML editing mode
Submitting pipeline runs, monitoring run status, viewing logs and outputs, subgraph execution drill-down
Browsing, searching, and managing component libraries — published components, user-defined components, and GitHub-based libraries
Creating, organizing, importing, and exporting pipelines — the pipeline library, folders, favorites, and YAML import/export
Run name templates, auto-redirect on run start, run filtering
Storing, replacing, and managing secrets used by pipeline components
Backend connection configuration, user preferences, and beta feature toggles
The redesigned home dashboard — pipeline list, run list, component library overview
Nested pipeline composition — creating and navigating into subgraph components
